executives.name: David Garofalo
executives.background: Mr. Garofalo has served as our Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer since August 2020. He has over 30 years of experience in the metals and mining industry. Previously, he served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Goldcorp Inc. from 2016 to 2019 and as President and Chief Executive Officer of Hudbay Minerals Inc. from 2010 to 2016.

executives.name: Elizabeth McGregor
executives.background: Ms. McGregor was previously the CFO of Tahoe Resources Inc. and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

tenure_dates.title: Director of Project Finance and Cost Control; Administration Manager (Peñasquito mine); Director of Risk

executives.name: Joe Dick
executives.background: Joe Dick has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer at Eldorado before transitioning to a strategic role.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Latin American Operations

executives.name: Raman Randhawa
executives.background: Mr. Randhawa is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of financial experience in the mining industry. He previously served as CFO of Capstone Mining and held senior roles at Goldcorp.

executives.name: Charles Jeannes
executives.background: Mr. Jeannes is a mining industry veteran, formerly the President and CEO of Goldcorp Inc. from 2008 to 2016.

executives.name: Chris Woodall
executives.background: Mr. Woodall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior operational roles at Goldcorp and Barrick Gold.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Canada and US Operations

executives.name: Jason Attew
executives.background: Mr. Attew is a mining industry executive with over 25 years of experience in investment banking and corporate strategy. He was previously CFO of Goldcorp Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Elizabeth McGregor
board_of_directors.background: Ms. McGregor was previously the CFO of Tahoe Resources Inc. and is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

tenure_dates.title: Director of Project Finance and Cost Control; Administration Manager (Peñasquito mine); Director of Risk

board_of_directors.background: Mr. Randhawa is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of financial experience in the mining industry. He previously served as CFO of Capstone Mining and held senior roles at Goldcorp.
